text:
What are your initial impressions of Grok 4.20?  

Major upgrades are still landing every week.

Thank you Jensen and NVIDIA! She’s a real beauty! I was told I’d be getting a secret gift, with a hint that it requires 20 amps. (So I knew it had to be good). She’ll make for a beautiful, spacious home for my Dobby the House Elf claw, among lots of other tinkering, thank you!!

The signature is alluding to NVIDIA GTC 2015, where Jensen excitedly told an audience of, at the time, mostly gamers and scientific computing professionals that Deep Learning is The Next Big Thing, citing among other examples my PhD thesis (one of the first image captioning https://t.co/Fvn2kRjSHD

The attention economy broke human focus. Now hardware is fixing it.

A $495 neuromodulation headset. 20 minutes a day. Measurable improvement in attention and stress regulation. TechCrunch Already deployed at Google, UFC, and YC.

我们的核心业务富有韧性并 产生充足的现金流，为我们加大 AI 投入提供支撑，包括招募顶尖 AI 人才及升级 AI

Vibe design is here ✨

I got early access to Stitch from @GoogleDeepMind and was blown away - it's like partnering with a pro designer.

Start with a simple prompt for a mobile or Web UI and iterate through to a clickable prototype (and code!).

I love how it starts every project by creating a design system to ensure consistent fonts, colors, and styles.

You can chat with the agent to change the vibe & it automatically updates everything for you.

Or you can pull in an existing design system…
